# Agreement

It is important to note that we delve into the landscape of obligations. Pursuant to the aforementioned terms, the parties shall cease and desist from any and all action. Moreover, this sentence is intentionally verbose and contains enough words to demonstrate that sentence length should be flagged by the linter because long winding prose is harder for readers to understand and can obscure the actual legal obligation being described.

```js
const deliberatelyBad = "delve pursuant to herein";
```
